text.title: Gcp Llm Prompts Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example for the gcp-llm-prompts methodology; demonstrates the full procedure resolving to a valid output artefact.

example.content:
A platform engineer runs the curated cost-review prompt against a project.
Inputs:
- task: cost_review - template_id: cost-review-v2 - inputs: project_id, period, billing_export_dataset.
Output spec (prompt-template artefact):
```yaml task: cost_review template_id: cost-review-v2 inputs: - name: project_id type: string - name: period type: string - name: billing_export_dataset type: string expected_output_shape: cost-report constraints: - output_must_validate_against_schema_cost_report - no_pii ```
